query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_delivery.subscriptions (
                id,
                contract_id,
                tenant_id,
                purchase_order_id,
                status,
                quantity,
                next_quantity,
                product_id,
                delivery_cycle,
                create_date,
                end_date,
                delivery_date,
                shipping_destination_id,
                timezone
                ) VALUES (
                ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?
                )
